name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusionN ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

VARIABLES proc, state



TypeOK == /\ proc \in 1..N
          /\ state \in [proc -> {"idle", "trying", "critical"}]

Init == /\ proc = 1..N
        /\ state = [proc -> "idle"]

Next == \/ \E p \in proc:
          /\ state[p] = "idle"
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "trying"]
        \/ \E p \in proc:
          /\ state[p] = "trying"
          /\ \A q \in proc: q # p => state[q] # "critical"
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "critical"]
        \/ \E p \in proc:
          /\ state[p] = "critical"
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "idle"]
        \/ state' = state

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_state

====

name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets, TLC

CONSTANT N, Participants

VARIABLES state, votes, decision

Prepare = [msg |-> Prepare, sender |-> "Coordinator", receiver |-> msg.receiver]
VoteYes = [msg |-> VoteYes, sender |-> "Participant", receiver |-> msg.receiver]
VoteNo = [msg |-> VoteNo, sender |-> "Participant", receiver |-> msg.receiver]
Commit = [msg |-> Commit, sender |-> "Coordinator", receiver |-> msg.receiver]
Abort = [msg |-> Abort, sender |-> "Coordinator", receiver |-> msg.receiver]

Init == 
  /\ state = [p \in Participants |-> "Init"]
  /\ votes = [p \in Participants |-> 0]
  /\ decision = "None"

Next == 
  /\ \E p \in Participants :
        /\ state[p] = "Init"
        /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "Prepared"]
        /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![p] = 1]
  \/ \E p \in Participants :
        /\ state[p] = "Prepared"
        /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "Committed"]
        /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![p] = 2]
  \/ \E p \in Participants :
        /\ state[p] = "Prepared"
        /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "Aborted"]
        /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![p] = 3]
  \/ decision = "None" /\ decision' = "Commit"
  \/ decision = "None" /\ decision' = "Abort"
  \/ decision' = decision
  /\ state' = state
  /\ votes' = votes

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, votes, decision>>

====

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES forks, state

(* Forks are represented as a set of indices of philosophers who currently hold them *)
Init == 
  /\ forks = {}
  /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

(* Helper predicates *)
ForkFree(i) == ~(i \in forks)
HasFork(i) == i \in forks
HasBothForks(i) == ForkFree(i) /\ ForkFree((i % N) + 1)

(* Transition: philosopher i picks up both forks if they are free *)
PickUp(i) == 
  /\ state[i] = "hungry"
  /\ HasBothForks(i)
  /\ forks' = forks \cup {i, (i % N) + 1}
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]

(* Transition: philosopher i puts down both forks *)
PutDown(i) == 
  /\ state[i] = "eating"
  /\ forks' = forks \ {i, (i % N) + 1}
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]

(* Transition: philosopher i becomes hungry *)
BecomeHungry(i) == 
  /\ state[i] = "thinking"
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]

Next == \E i \in 1..N : 
  \/ PickUp(i)
  \/ PutDown(i)
  \/ BecomeHungry(i)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, state>>

====

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANT N

VARIABLES num, flag

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
          /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 1 + Max(num)]
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

====

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail

TypeOK == head \in 0..K /\ tail \in 0..K /\ Len(q) = tail - head

Init == /\ q = <<>> /\ head = 0 /\ tail = 0

Next == 
  \/ /\ head < tail
     /\ head' = head + 1
     /\ tail' = tail
     /\ q' = SubSeq(q, head + 1, tail)
  \/ /\ head = tail
     /\ head' = head
     /\ tail' = tail
     /\ q' = q

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail>>

====

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS NULL, Server

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

Init == /\ currentTerm = 0
        /\ votedFor = [s \in Server |-> NULL]
        /\ state = [s \in Server |-> "Follower"]

Next == \/ \E s \in Server:
          /\ state[s] = "Follower"
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![s] = "Candidate"]
          /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
          /\ votedFor' = [votedFor EXCEPT ![s] = s]
        \/ \E s \in Server:
          /\ state[s] = "Candidate"
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![s] = "Leader"]
          /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
          /\ votedFor' = votedFor
        \/ /\ state' = state
           /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
           /\ votedFor' = votedFor

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

====

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == /\ readers = 0
       /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ readers' = readers + 1
          /\ writer_active' = writer_active
      \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ readers' = readers
          /\ writer_active' = TRUE
      \/ /\ writer_active = TRUE
          /\ readers' = readers
          /\ writer_active' = FALSE

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

====

name: Distributed Snapshot (Chandy-Lamport)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ChandyLamportSnapshot ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Channels, Process, Channel

VARIABLES state, channelState, snapshot, markerSent

(* State of each process *)
State == [p \in Process |-> [localState |-> Nat, recorded |-> BOOLEAN]]

(* State of each channel *)
ChannelState == [c \in Channels |-> [messages |-> Seq(Nat), recorded |-> BOOLEAN]]

(* Initial state: all processes have localState 0, not recorded; all channels empty, not recorded *)
Init == /\ state = [p \in Process |-> [localState |-> 0, recorded |-> FALSE]]
        /\ channelState = [c \in Channels |-> [messages |-> <<>>, recorded |-> FALSE]]
        /\ snapshot = [p \in Process |-> [localState |-> 0, recorded |-> FALSE]]
        /\ markerSent = [c \in Channels |-> FALSE]

(* Sending a message *)
SendMsg == \E p \in Process : \E m \in Nat : \E c \in Channels :
           /\ Channel(p, c) = TRUE
           /\ channelState' = [channelState EXCEPT ![c].messages = Append(channelState[c].messages, m)]
           /\ UNCHANGED <<state, snapshot, markerSent>>

(* Receiving a message *)
RecvMsg == \E p \in Process : \E c \in Channels : \E m \in Nat :
           /\ Channel(c, p) = TRUE
           /\ channelState[c].messages = <<m>> ++ rest
           /\ channelState' = [channelState EXCEPT ![c].messages = rest]
           /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p].localState = state[p].localState + 1]
           /\ UNCHANGED <<snapshot, markerSent>>

(* Sending a marker *)
SendMarker == \E p \in Process : \E c \in Channels :
              /\ Channel(p, c) = TRUE
              /\ markerSent' = [markerSent EXCEPT ![c] = TRUE]
              /\ UNCHANGED <<state, snapshot, channelState>>

(* Receiving a marker *)
RecvMarker == \E p \in Process : \E c \in Channels :
              /\ Channel(c, p) = TRUE
              /\ markerSent[c] = FALSE
              /\ snapshot' = [snapshot EXCEPT ![p] = [localState : state[p].localState, recorded : TRUE]]
              /\ channelState' = [channelState EXCEPT ![c].recorded = TRUE]
              /\ UNCHANGED <<state, markerSent>>

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == \/ SendMsg
        \/ RecvMsg
        \/ SendMarker
        \/ RecvMarker

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, channelState, snapshot, markerSent>>

====

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANT N

VARIABLE token

Init == token = 1

Next == token' = %(token, N) + 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_token

====

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets, TLC

CONSTANTS Keys, Values

VARIABLES store

TypeOK == /\ store \in [Keys -> Values]
          /\ Keys /= {}
          /\ Values /= {}

Init == /\ store \in [Keys -> Values]
        /\ store = [k \in Keys |-> 0]

Next == \/ /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]
          /\ k \in Keys
          /\ v \in Values
        \/ /\ store' = store

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_store

====

name: Paxos Single-Decree
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Paxos ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES acceptors, proposers, chosen

CONSTANT N, M

TypeOK == acceptors \in [1..N -> [ballot: Nat, value: Nat]] /\
          proposers \in [1..M -> [ballot: Nat, value: Nat]] /\
          chosen \in [1..N -> Nat]

Init == acceptors = [i \in 1..N |-> [ballot |-> 0, value |-> 0]] /\
        proposers = [i \in 1..M |-> [ballot |-> 0, value |-> 0]] /\
        chosen = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]

Prepare(p) == /\ proposers' = [proposers EXCEPT ![p] = [ballot |-> proposers[p].ballot + 1, value |-> proposers[p].value]]
              /\ acceptors' = acceptors

Promise(a) == /\ acceptors' = [acceptors EXCEPT ![a] = [ballot |-> acceptors[a].ballot, value |-> acceptors[a].value]]
             /\ proposers' = proposers

Accept(p) == /\ proposers' = [proposers EXCEPT ![p] = [ballot |-> proposers[p].ballot, value |-> proposers[p].value]]
            /\ acceptors' = acceptors

Accepted(a) == /\ acceptors' = [acceptors EXCEPT ![a] = [ballot |-> proposers[a].ballot, value |-> proposers[a].value]]
             /\ proposers' = proposers

Next == \/ \E p \in 1..M: Prepare(p)
        \/ \E a \in 1..N: Promise(a)
        \/ \E p \in 1..M: Accept(p)
        \/ \E a \in 1..N: Accepted(a)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<acceptors, proposers, chosen>> /\ TypeOK

====

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileSender ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets, TLC

CONSTANTS File, ChunkSize, MaxRetries, Timeout
VARIABLES acked, channel, chunks, lost, retransmits, sent, ticks, timer

          /\ sent \in SUBSET 1..Len(chunks)
          /\ acked \in SUBSET 1..Len(chunks)
          /\ retransmits \in Seq(0..MaxRetries)
          /\ timer \in 0..Timeout
          /\ channel \in SUBSET 1..Len(chunks)
          /\ lost \in SUBSET 1..Len(chunks)
          /\ ticks \in Nat

Init == /\ chunks = Split(File, ChunkSize)
        /\ sent = {}
        /\ acked = {}
        /\ retransmits = Rep(0, Len(chunks))
        /\ timer = 0
        /\ channel = {}
        /\ lost = {}
        /\ ticks = 0

SendChunk(i) == /\ i \in 1..Len(chunks)
                /\ i \notin sent
                /\ sent' = sent \cup {i}
                /\ channel' = channel \cup {i}
                /\ retransmits' = SUBST(retransmits, i, retransmits[i] + 1)
                /\ timer' = Timeout
                /\ UNCHANGED <<chunks, acked, lost, ticks>>

AckChunk(i) == /\ i \in channel
              /\ channel' = channel \setminus {i}
              /\ acked' = acked \cup {i}
              /\ UNCHANGED <<chunks, sent, retransmits, timer, lost, ticks>>

TimeoutTick == /\ timer > 0
               /\ timer' = timer - 1
               /\ UNCHANGED <<chunks, sent, retransmits, channel, acked, lost, ticks>>

Tick == /\ timer = 0
        /\ retransmits = Rep(MaxRetries, Len(chunks))
        /\ UNCHANGED <<chunks, sent, retransmits, channel, acked, lost, ticks>>

LostMessage(i) == /\ i \in channel
                 /\ channel' = channel \setminus {i}
                 /\ lost' = lost \cup {i}
                 /\ UNCHANGED <<chunks, sent, retransmits, timer, acked, ticks>>

Next == \/ \E i \in 1..Len(chunks) : SendChunk(i)
       \/ \E i \in channel : AckChunk(i)
       \/ \E i \in channel : LostMessage(i)
       \/ TimeoutTick
       \/ Tick

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<chunks, sent, retransmits, channel, acked, lost, timer, ticks>>

---- MODULE FileSender ----
====
